data.reasoningText:
Let me also check the Api.csproj and Tests.csproj files, and also check the target frameworks to understand compatibility.

Looking at the NuGet versions:
- System.Text.Json latest stable: 10.0.7 (filtering out preview/rc)
- Azure.Identity latest stable: 1.21.0

But wait - the Worker project targets net8.0 and currently uses System.Text.Json 8.0.4. The other projects also target net8.0 but use System.Text.Json 10.0.1. Let me check if System.Text.Json 10.x is compatible with net8.0.


System.Text.Json 10.0.x should work fine on net8.0 since the existing projects are already using 10.0.1, so I'll proceed with that assumption and review the other project files as well.
